message:
feat: add --disable-gpu flag for SSH/headless environments

- Add --disable-gpu CLI flag (opt-in, GPU enabled by default)
- Unset DISPLAY env var before Chrome exec to prevent X11 errors
- Add headless-friendly flags: --no-sandbox, --disable-dev-shm-usage
- Bump version to 0.8.8

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "termweb",
-  "version": "0.8.7",
+  "version": "0.8.8",
   "description": "Web browser in your terminal using Kitty graphics protocol. SDK for building terminal apps with web technologies.",
   "main": "./lib/index.js",
   "bin": {
